name: BB:Threats: Suspicious Network Traffic
notes:
This Building Block detects suspicious network traffic from a malicious IP categorized by Xforce on a web server.

Note: The Confidence Factor ranges between 0 to 100. On assets of lower importance, an administrator might weigh an X-Force rule to trigger on a higher confidence factor of 75. When tuning rules, customers should think of a scale where 50 is the tipping point.

See the blog https://ibm.biz/BdPEXv for details.
bb_references: BB:Threats: Suspicious Network Traffic on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Request In Progress, Application.Request Successful
when the event context is Remote to Local

when the event matches XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Anonymization Services',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Malware',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Botnet Command and Control Server',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Spam',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Cryptocurrency Mining',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Scanning IPs',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Bots',sourceip) > 75 AQL filter query
when at least 50 events are seen with the same URL Host (custom) in 10 minutes
thresholds: when at least 50 events are seen with the same URL Host (custom) in 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:Threats: Suspicious Network Traffic on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Web Servers
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Request In Progress, Application.Request Successful
AND when the event context is Remote to Local

AND when the event matches XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Anonymization Services',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Malware',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Botnet Command and Control Server',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Spam',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Cryptocurrency Mining',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Scanning IPs',sourceip) > 75 OR XFORCE_IP_CONFIDENCE('Bots',sourceip) > 75 AQL filter query
AND when at least 50 events are seen with the same URL Host (custom) in 10 minutes
